perturbation.original_text: Except as otherwise permitted hereunder, the Receiving Party hereby agrees that the Receiving Party and its Representatives shall use the Evaluation Material solely for the purpose of evaluating a Possible Transaction and for no other purpose, that the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information (as defined below) will be kept confidential and that the Receiving Party and its Representatives will not disclose any of the Evaluation Material or the Discussion Information in any manner whatsoever; provided , however , that (i) the Receiving Party may make any disclosure of the Evaluation Material or the Discussion Information to which the Disclosing Party gives its prior written consent, and (ii) the Receiving Party may make any disclosure of the Evaluation Material or the Discussion Information to such of its Representatives who need to know such information for the purpose of assisting the Receiving Party in its evaluation of a Possible Transaction, are provided with a copy of this letter agreement, agree to keep the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information confidential and agree to be bound by the terms of this letter agreement to the same extent as if they were parties hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: Except as otherwise permitted hereunder, the Receiving Party hereby agrees that the Receiving Party shall use the Evaluation Material solely for the purpose of evaluating a Possible Transaction and for no other purpose, that the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information (as defined below) will be kept confidential and that the Receiving Party will not disclose any of the Evaluation Material or the Discussion Information in any manner whatsoever; provided , however , that (i) the Receiving Party may make any disclosure of the Evaluation Material or the Discussion Information to which the Disclosing Party gives its prior written consent, and (ii) the Receiving Party may make any disclosure of the Evaluation Material or the Discussion Information to such of its Representatives who need to know such information for the purpose of assisting the Receiving Party in its evaluation of a Possible Transaction, are provided with a copy of this letter agreement, agree to keep the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information confidential and agree to be bound by the terms of this letter agreement to the same extent as if they were parties hereto.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by removing the phrase 'and its Representatives' from the main confidentiality clause. The initial statement requires the Receiving Party and its Representatives to keep information confidential but later on the change means, the Receiving party is only responsible for keeping the information confidential. This directly conflicts with the later part of the same paragraph (ii) clause that outlines conditions under which the receiving party may share information to Representatives. This creates an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Except as otherwise permitted hereunder, the Receiving Party hereby agrees that the Receiving Party shall use the Evaluation Material solely for the purpose of evaluating a Possible Transaction and for no other purpose, that the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information (as defined below) will be kept confidential and that the Receiving Party will not disclose any of the Evaluation Material or the Discussion Information in any manner whatsoever; provided , however , that (i) the Receiving Party may make any disclosure of the Evaluation Material or the Discussion Information to which the Disclosing Party gives its prior written consent, and (ii) the Receiving Party may make any disclosure of the Evaluation Material or the Discussion Information to such of its Representatives who need to know such information for the purpose of assisting the Receiving Party in its evaluation of a Possible Transaction, are provided with a copy of this letter agreement, agree to keep the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information confidential and agree to be bound by the terms of this letter agreement to the same extent as if they were parties hereto.
perturbation.justification: The original text includes 'and its Representatives' in the confidentiality clause, meaning both the Receiving Party and its Representatives are obligated to keep information confidential. The changed text removes 'and its Representatives' from the main confidentiality clause, making only the Receiving Party directly responsible. This contradicts the provision in clause (ii) of both texts, which outlines conditions for disclosing information to Representatives, implying they also have confidentiality obligations. The change creates a direct conflict because it removes the Representatives' direct confidentiality obligation initially stated, creating an in-text contradiction as per the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition.

perturbation.original_text: In any event, the Receiving Party agrees to undertake reasonable precautions to safeguard and protect the confidentiality of the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information, the Receiving Party hereby accepts responsibility for any breach of this letter agreement by any of its Representatives (it being understood that such responsibility shall be in addition to and not by way of limitation of any right or remedy that the Company may have against such Representatives), and the Receiving Party agrees at its sole expense to take all reasonable measures to restrain its Representatives from prohibited or unauthorized disclosure or uses of the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information.
perturbation.changed_text: In any event, the Receiving Party agrees to undertake reasonable precautions to safeguard and protect the confidentiality of the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information, and the Receiving Party agrees at its sole expense to take all reasonable measures to restrain its Representatives from prohibited or unauthorized disclosure or uses of the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information.
perturbation.explanation: This change removes the Receiving Party's acceptance of responsibility for breaches of the agreement by its Representatives. This contradicts the overall intent of the NDA and previous clauses which attempt to ensure the Receiving Party is responsible for its Representatives' actions, introducing in-text contradiction regarding liability.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In any event, the Receiving Party agrees to undertake reasonable precautions to safeguard and protect the confidentiality of the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information, and the Receiving Party agrees at its sole expense to take all reasonable measures to restrain its Representatives from prohibited or unauthorized disclosure or uses of the Evaluation Material and the Discussion Information.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly states the Receiving Party accepts responsibility for breaches by its Representatives. The changed text removes this explicit acceptance, which, according to the Perturbation Explanation, contradicts the overall intent of the NDA and previous clauses aiming to ensure the Receiving Party is responsible for its Representatives' actions. This creates an in-text contradiction regarding liability, as the Contradicted Text implies the Receiving Party has a higher degree of responsibility compared to the Changed Text.
